title: capsella bursa-pastoris prostrata
intro: Capsella bursa-pastoris prostrata, also known as the small or prostrate shepherd's purse, is a variety of the Capsella bursa-pastoris plant, a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Capsella bursa-pastoris prostrata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Capsella bursa-pastoris prostrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
